headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 11 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 11 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 5 critical, 13 high, 8 medium, 13 normal. Key bases needing attention include Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR), Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) and Iaşi (IAS/LRIA); plus 15 other bases. 8 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is fog / freezing fog, mist and very low visibility  — most notably around Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) and Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP). Network hotspots: Marche (AOI/LIPY), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Turku (TKU/EFTU), Oslo-Gardermoen (OSL/ENGM), Sandefjord Airport, Torp (TRF/ENTO) and 6 others. Primary drivers: very low visibility, low cloud base and RVR limitations. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Marche (AOI/LIPY), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Oslo-Gardermoen (OSL/ENGM) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 11 airports right now. Base airports (focus): Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: fog; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 800 m | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 500 m | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 100 ft; forecast below approach minima at times | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — CRIT: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — HIGH: fog; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 700 m and 12 others. Worst affected now: Marche (AOI/LIPY) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below alternate minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Turku (TKU/EFTU) — CRIT: fog; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Oslo-Gardermoen (OSL/ENGM) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, very low visibility, low ceilings) | Sandefjord Airport, Torp (TRF/ENTO) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 200 ft (drivers: very low visibility, low ceilings, mist) | Göteborg Landvetter (GOT/ESGG) — CRIT: fog; snow; visibility down to 200 m, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) and 5 others. Changed since last run: Marche (AOI/LIPY), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Oslo-Gardermoen (OSL/ENGM), Sandefjord Airport, Torp (TRF/ENTO), Göteborg Landvetter (GOT/ESGG), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Suceava Stefan cel Mare (SCV/LRSV), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) and 2 others.
